description_long: This is a compact, single-bladed axe with a robust, angular steel head and a short, sturdy handle. The blade is broad and slightly curved, with a pronounced edge and a thick poll opposite the cutting side, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The handle is made of dark wood, featuring a subtle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control, and is adorned with turquoise runic or stylized markings that add a decorative, possibly thematic, touch. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with the top of the handle visible above the blade, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall design is practical yet visually striking, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or as a prop in themed settings. The materials and construction indicate durability and functionality, while the markings provide a unique, possibly custom or fantasy-inspired aesthetic.
description: A compact, single-bladed axe with a robust steel head, a short curved wooden handle, and turquoise runic markings. The design is both functional and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the pointed end of the head and the runic markings on the handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the broad, curved blade and the decorative turquoise markings on the handle.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the poll of the axe head and the full length of the handle with visible runic text.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the blade's profile and the ergonomic curve of the handle, along with the runic designs.
attribute_handle_type: Short, slightly curved wooden handle with an ergonomic grip and round cross-section, decorated with turquoise markings.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad, slightly curved steel blade with a thick poll and pointed top, featuring a pronounced cutting edge and angular geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the axe head.
